title: Manufacturing Engineer - Jindal Steel & Power - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Jindal Steel & Power - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Jindal Steel & Power in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Jindal Steel & Power:
Jindal Steel & Power is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jindal Steel & Power!
